name: Anti-bot age-gate before access
description: Holds new joins in an unverified state until their account is at least N days old AND they pass a one-click human check. Blocks classic drive-by bot raids without forcing real users through CAPTCHA.
i18nNotes: All gate copy lives in the en locale under welcome.age_gate.* and welcome.human_check.*. Account-age value is configurable in the dashboard.
